auth.name: Name
auth.termsPrefix: By registering, you agree to our
auth.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter
auth.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms to register
auth.loginError: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.registerError: Could not create your account. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.checkYourEmailDescription: We've sent password reset instructions to {email}. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.forgotPasswordError: Could not send the reset link. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordOtpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email.
auth.verifyResetCodeError: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordFormDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to sign in…
auth.resetPasswordError: Could not update your password. Please try again.
auth.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password

profile.settingsSubtitle: Manage your account, security, and clinic preferences.
profile.accountPlaceholderDescription: Update your name, email, and profile photo here in a future release.
profile.notificationsPlaceholderDescription: Configure email and in-app alerts when this section is available.
profile.clinicPlaceholderDescription: Manage tenant-specific options for your clinic workspace.
profile.securityDescription: Use a strong password you do not use elsewhere. You will stay signed in after updating.
profile.changePasswordError: Could not update your password. Check your current password and try again.
profile.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password
